title: halophila ovalis subsp. linearis
intro: Halophila ovalis subsp. linearis, also known as the linear-leaved sea grass, is a type of marine angiosperm plant found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Halophila ovalis subsp. linearis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams.
